title: Naadody
subTitle: In search of Andrew who had promised him a job, Sachidananda ends up saving a millionaire's granddaughter. This gets him entangled in a series of grave issues.

subTitle: A struggling artist seeks inspiration in a remote village, only to encounter two fugitives whose troubled past challenges his views on morality and justice, leading him into a moral quandary.

subTitle: A greedy couple gets their son married to a rich woman because of their ambitions of becoming wealthy. However, when her family spirals into poverty, they try to cast her out.

title: Natholi Oru Cheriya Meenalla

title: Indian Rupee
subTitle: Jayaprakash, a real estate agent aspiring for business success, experiences a paradigm shift in his life and work outlook upon meeting Achutha Menon.

subTitle: A truck driver is consumed by the phenomenon of sex. However, in an unforeseen turn of events, he ends up murdering his family.

subTitle: When businessman Appu's younger brother Hari is accused in a murder case, the former takes the blame to protect his sibling and also avenges the wrongdoing of his trade rival, Sivan.

subTitle: Twin brothers, separated at birth and raised in different homes, are unaware of each other's existence until a shocking reunion as adults reveals their shared identity.

subTitle: Three friends travel to a city in search of a job. However, their lives take a turn when each one of them falls in love but their unemployed status leads them to make foolish decisions.

subTitle: A mass outbreak of Nipah virus, in the state of Kerala, causes tremendous fear in the hearts of the people. However, a group of courageous individuals step up and attempt to curb the epidemic.
